children.name: Vampyroteuthis
children.description: Vampyroteuthis — a genus of vampire squid in the family Vampyroteuthidae.

children.name: Vampyroteuthis infernalis
children.description: Vampyroteuthis infernalis — a species in the genus Vampyroteuthis, family Vampyroteuthidae. Also known as vampire squid.

children.name: Necroteuthis

children.name: Necroteuthis hungarica
children.description: Necroteuthis hungarica — a species in the genus Necroteuthis, family Vampyroteuthidae. Also known as vampire squid.
